title: Touch up auth test commands
body:
Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

When testing an authentication PR earlier today, I realized that a number of the commands had the target in the middle of the command rather than at the end.  Fixed that up and touched up a comment.

This test is not called during CI testing.  It's only used for testing on VM's from time to time.
